replies.msg:
Chan has background trained in Marketing from a good university in Australia. So, she is more experienced to position herself , identify the group of target audience (maybe blueC) and then SELL. Her body language is more relaxed. No problem on self confidence. I felt like she treated herself as a big sister talking to a young brother.

gPhone next time can be more relaxed. FIRM and STEADY ! Speaking too fast gave people a sense of anxiety or lack of experience. Body language are 80% of the language during ANY public appearance. Audience mostly buy on PERCEPTION !

Hope that gphone will not underestimate her. She won Erica Yuen ( trained in Econ in a good university on Econ.) in 2015.

Attacking her low productivity ( # of bills submitted), disappearance her and there during critical moments... are all great !! BUT he needs to predict HER responses before coming to public debate and FOLLOW through by 2nd , 3rd round of attack, seek the TIME duration advantage, seek the control !!

She was not slow and gave a quick ok rebuttal ( in fact, excuse). BUT gphonee did not follow through , BITE hard on her rebuttal, and corner her !!!

gPhone is great, but I still hope he has at least 2-3 more SENIOR veterans in age/experience, who are great at public debate, can help gPhone rehearse the public debate and give feedback on his attack strategies !!!

In USA. campaign IS A VERY SERIOUS business !!! Very capital and technology intensive war !!! Different departments....eg.. A firm like Cambridge Analytica used data mining TECHNOLOGY on all social media data for campaign candidate ( spending miliions ) to figure out the details on the their clients' election campaign ( words to say, web site to use, ad to put, group to target, etc..)

IT guys, anyone interested in data mining?

Most important is to get gPhone in !!!!
臭西邊夠班
